description:
Update coordinator server to load state from object storage.
Files:
- lib/bedrock/control_plane/coordinator/server.ex:

  - Remove has_persisted_tsl_in_raft check

  - Start director immediately after becoming leader
title: Load state from object storage on coordinator init
